# PERF-027 positive: large []byte make inside loop without pool
lang: go
file: PERF-027-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

func EncodeChunks(chunks []string) int {
	total := 0
	for range chunks {
		// Large scratch buffer re-allocated every iteration.
		buf := make([]byte, 8192)
		total += len(buf)
	}
	return total
}
